intro: Croton pyrosoma, also known as Scoloposteris, is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family, characterized by its unique, tree-like appearance and vibrant foliage. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its reported health benefits. The bioactive constituents of Croton pyrosoma include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
